assessment_objectives.objective: devices or types of devices to be uniquely identified and authenticated before establishing a connection are defined.
organization-defined devices or types of devices are authenticated before establishing a system connection.
devices and/or types of devices are uniquely identified and authenticated before establishing a local connection.
devices and/or types of devices are uniquely identified and authenticated before establishing a remote connection.
device identification and authentication are handled based on attestation by configuration management process.
devices and/or types of devices requiring use of cryptographically based, bidirectional authentication to authenticate before establishing one or more connections are defined.
devices and/or types of devices are authenticated before establishing a local connection using bidirectional authentication that is cryptographically based.
devices and/or types of devices are authenticated before establishing a remote connection using bidirectional authentication that is cryptographically based.
devices and/or types of devices are authenticated before establishing a network connection using bidirectional authentication that is cryptographically based.
<A.03.05.02.ODP[01]: devices or types of devices> are uniquely identified before establishing a system connection.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: all devices for identification, where feasible for authentication, and document when not feasible
